case_title: CELESTINE, PATRICIA VS JACK, JOSEPH UGENE C/O GUITTARD CHOCOLATE CO.

docket_entries.description: IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 2 MONTHS.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-28-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH FINAL PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 3/28/01 AT 10AM, AND THE COURT WILL DIMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY CELESTINE, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, JOSEPH UGENE C/O GUITTARD CHOCOLATE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-04-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-13-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, JOSEPH UGENE C/O GUITTARD CHOCOLATE CO. NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACK, JOSEPH UGENE C/O GUITTARD CHOCOLATE CO.
